title: GolfStudent 14L: Hybrid GatedMLP+Attn, d=288, vocab=1024, Muon+EMA, INT8+zlib
author: whitestone1121-web

data.description: 14-layer model with 10 causal-shift GatedMLP layers and 4 Flash Attention layers every 3rd layer, SwiGLU FFN with 3x expansion, RoPE on attention layers, weight-tied embedding and lm_head

novel_contributions: Hybrid architecture combining causal-shift GatedMLP and Flash Attention layers every 3rd layer
Use of Muon optimizer with momentum warmup and Adam for embeddings/scalars
EMA checkpointing with decay=0.997 updated every step
Per-row INT8 quantization combined with zlib compression to fit size constraints
Wallclock-aware learning rate warmdown in the last ~13% of training budget
Weight tying of embedding and lm_head to reduce parameter count
Use of SwiGLU FFN with 3x expansion
RoPE positional embeddings applied only on attention layers
